message:
feat(ad): add JVP (forward-mode) rule for Switch primitive

Implement forward-mode differentiation for Switch: the tangent of the
output equals the tangent of the selected branch, with zero tangent for
the integer index input and all non-selected branches. Handles edge
cases where tangent arrays may be shorter than expected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
